## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (client), Alice Ochieng (AI assistant), and Polycarp Ouko (Athena manager) to kick off the partnership and set expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is excited to work with Alice and leverage her AI capabilities to support his growing agency's operations](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [The 100-day curriculum will help onboard Alice into Marcel's workflow and processes](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Check-in calls were scheduled for 4-week, 8-week, and 12-week marks to review progress](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Both parties committed to the partnership, with understanding that there may be a learning curve initially](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

## Topics

### Introductions and Background

  - [Marcel has reviewed Alice's profile and is impressed by her initiative and intellectual curiosity](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Alice is thrilled to work with Marcel given his expertise in innovative AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Polycarp provided an overview of Athena's 100-day onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### 100-Day Curriculum

  - [Curated plans to integrate Alice into Marcel's inbox, calendar, and travel management](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Will help Alice understand Marcel's needs and priorities for increased productivity](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Flexible approach to tailor the curriculum based on Marcel's preferences](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Partnership Rituals

  - [Monday kick-offs to set weekly priorities (30 mins)](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Friday wrap-ups to review the week (30 mins)](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Tues/Thurs async check-ins (5 mins)](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [4-week, 8-week, 12-week check-in calls scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Commitment and Next Steps

  - [Marcel committed to spending sufficient time onboarding Alice](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Alice committed to open communication and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Next step is for Alice to start engaging with Marcel's workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to begin working through the 100-day curriculum with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [4-week check-in scheduled for Aug 2nd at 9am PT](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [8-week check-in scheduled for Sept 6th at 9am PT](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [12-week check-in scheduled for Oct 4th at 9am PT](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Polycarp to follow up before the 4-week check-in](https://fathom.video/share/GyQJE-HxydCV19ans8yEt5jrAwcbxHzc?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
